title: Just Liquors [Just Additions Series]
description: This mod adds the process of Distillation to make Liquors!
body:
# **Features**

-Distillery and Aging Barrel to make Liquors!

-Liquor Cabinet to hold all your precious Liquors

-Many kinds of Liquors (even more will come with updates!)
![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03d3e2654b22bec5de6dca99d1819aee7a426620.png)
